title: cineraria platycarpa
intro: Cineraria platycarpa, also known as the Cape marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cineraria platycarpa include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
